nasb.text: speaking to one another in psalms and hymns and spiritual songs, singing and making melody with your heart to the Lord;

esv.text: addressing one another in psalms and hymns and spiritual songs, singing and making melody to the Lord with your heart,

cnv.text: 應當用詩章、聖詩、靈歌，彼此呼應，口唱心和地讚美主。

ccb.text: 要用诗篇、圣乐、灵歌互相激励，从心底唱出赞美主的旋律。

csbs.text: 用诗篇、圣诗、属灵的诗歌彼此对说， 从你们的心里，歌颂赞美主；
